notes: Routine covers screenshots, social cards, MDX compatibility checks, and stale docs metadata.
Pick one docs freshness family per run; do not bundle broad docs redesign or translation work.
Generated visual assets must come from real docs/client/admin surfaces.
2026-05-01 update: community docs copy remediation is complete; next concrete work is a targeted media refresh after active UI updates stabilize.
Known refresh candidates: admin-create-garden.png, admin-work-queue.png, admin-work-detail.png, admin-garden-impact.png, client-work-dashboard.png, and a distinct Donate social image.
Do not touch app UI/i18n/contracts/shared/indexer surfaces from this hub unless the user explicitly starts a separate UI alignment pass.

ui.handoff_note: Docs component UI is out of scope unless a rendered docs layout regression appears.

state_api.handoff_note: Concrete next lane: after UI stabilization, replace scoped docs screenshots/social assets, update MDX references/alt text, and run docs audit/build/vocab plus rendered desktop/mobile checks.

contracts.handoff_note: No contract work. Keep this lane n/a.

qa_pass_1.handoff_note: Visual QA after media replacement: check screenshot relevance, legibility, Donate/Endow distinction, and desktop/mobile docs render.

qa_pass_2.handoff_note: Regression QA after visual review: re-run docs gates, generated-page scans, and status/handoff consistency checks.

history.note: Converted docs freshness idea note into this backlog hub and deleted the old idea note to avoid duplicate truth.

Expanded hub with the post-Matt-review community docs media refresh plan: preserve completed copy pass, wait for UI stabilization, then refresh stale admin screenshots, Work Dashboard screenshot, and Donate social image.
